intro: Massey’s Bachelor of Health Science (Mental Health and Addiction) will help you start or advance a career in the mental health and addictions workforce.

title: Human Nutrition – Bachelor of Health Science
intro: Fuelling healthier futures - Massey’s Bachelor of Health Science (Human Nutrition) is grounded in nutrition and public health, giving you the skills to transform individual, community and population health outcomes.

title: Geography – Bachelor of Arts (Honours)
intro: With Massey’s Bachelor of Arts (Honours) (Geography) you can take your study of geography further.

title: Economics – Bachelor of Arts (Honours)
intro: With Massey’s Bachelor of Arts (Honours) (Economics) you can take your undergraduate study of economics further.

title: English – Bachelor of Arts (Honours)
intro: With Massey’s Bachelor of Arts (Honours) (English), you can take your undergraduate study of English further.

title: Media Studies – Bachelor of Arts (Honours)
intro: With Massey’s Bachelor of Arts (Honours) (Media Studies), you’ll develop versatile skills that will make you highly sought-after in many careers.

title: Social Anthropology – Bachelor of Arts (Honours)
intro: With Massey’s Bachelor of Arts (Honours) (Social Anthropology) you can take your undergraduate study of social anthropology further.

title: Sociology – Bachelor of Arts (Honours)
intro: Take your study of sociology to the next level. Show your in-depth understanding of sociology and its application to the real world with Massey's Bachelor of Arts (Honours) (Sociology).

title: Defence and Security Studies – Bachelor of Arts (Honours)
intro: With Massey’s Bachelor of Arts with Honours (Defence and Security Studies) you can take your undergraduate study of defence and security further.

title: Chemistry – Bachelor of Science
intro: Gain sought-after scientific, analytic, and problem-solving skills with Massey's Bachelor of Science (Chemistry).

title: Ecology and Conservation – Bachelor of Science
intro: From molecules to forests, ecology is a broad discipline that teaches you how to make sense of the interactions between organisms and their environment.

title: Computer Science – Bachelor of Science
intro: Massey provides you with the technical skills and knowledge to take your place in the fastest-growing industry in the world. Connect with the industry while you study for a head start in software development.

title: Zoology – Bachelor of Science
intro: Let your love of animals take you into a field that is in high demand throughout New Zealand. With Massey's Bachelor of Science (Zoology) you have the chance to learn everything there is to know about animals.

title: Molecular Cell Biology – Bachelor of Science
intro: Cells and the molecules that make them are the building blocks of all life. Join the molecular revolution in biology and develop sought after scientific skills in molecular cell biology.

title: Environmental Science – Bachelor of Science
intro: Studying environmental science at Massey will give you the tools and understanding needed to help create a sustainable path for New Zealand and the world.

title: Earth Science – Bachelor of Science
intro: When you join the Bachelor of Science (Earth Science) you’ll join an area that’s solving geotechnical and environmental problems.

title: Mathematics – Bachelor of Science
intro: The Bachelor of Science (Mathematics) will give you the skills to solve problems in areas such as computer programming, climate modelling, and transportation.

title: Microbiology – Bachelor of Science
intro: Join Massey’s unique Bachelor of Science (Microbiology) to explore and understand microbes in the environment, from the soil to the air, and in the human body.

title: Human Nutrition – Bachelor of Science
intro: If you are passionate about food and nutrition and want to learn more about the science behind how diet affects health, then Massey’s Bachelor of Science (Human Nutrition) is for you.

title: Psychology – Bachelor of Science
intro: Join Massey’s market-leading Bachelor of Science (Psychology) and learn how people perceive, learn, think, develop, behave, and relate to one another.

title: Plant Science – Bachelor of Science
intro: Join the Bachelor of Science (Plant Science) at Massey - the only university in New Zealand where you can study the full spectrum of plant science from molecular biology and evolution, through to agriculture and horticulture.

title: Statistics – Bachelor of Science
intro: Learn how to make sense of the information that surrounds us with Massey’s Bachelor of Science (Statistics).

title: Financial Advice – Diploma in Business Studies
intro: With Massey's Diploma in Business Studies (Financial Advice) you'll gain introductory specialist knowledge and financial advice skills to prepare you for entry into the financial advice industry.

title: Without Specialisation – Diploma in Business Studies
intro: The Diploma in Business Studies is a flexible qualification that can be completed in one year full-time, and may be a stepping-stone to a Bachelor of Business.

title: Construction Project Management – Postgraduate Diploma in Construction
intro: The Postgraduate Diploma in Construction (Construction Project Management) is a stepping stone to a research-based degree. Learn key project management skills, taught by industry experts.

title: Construction Law – Postgraduate Diploma in Construction
intro: The Postgraduate Diploma in Construction (Construction Law) is a stepping stone to a research-based degree. Learn from senior faculty members and industry experts from a range of relevant backgrounds.

title: Quantity Surveying – Postgraduate Diploma in Construction
intro: The Postgraduate Diploma in Construction (Quantity Surveying) is a stepping stone to a research-based degree such as a master’s. Gain advanced skills and knowledge required of senior quantity surveyors and commercial managers.

title: Digital Built Environment – Postgraduate Diploma in Construction
intro: With Massey’s Postgraduate Diploma in Construction (Digital Built Environment) you’ll gain construction management skills for the modern world.

title: Sustainable Built Environment – Postgraduate Diploma in Construction
intro: With Massey’s Postgraduate Diploma in Construction (Sustainable Built Environment) you’ll learn strategies and techniques for sustainable design and construction of built environments.

title: Without Specialisation – Postgraduate Diploma in Construction
intro: The Postgraduate Diploma in Construction is a stepping stone to a research-based degree. You’ll become a construction professional, with relevant knowledge and skills the industry needs.

title: Without Specialisation – Master of Veterinary Studies
intro: Develop expertise in a specific area of veterinary science to progress your professional development.

title: Sustainable Climate Systems – Bachelor of Science
intro: How do we counteract the impacts of climate change? By collecting evidence, seeking new perspectives, challenging conclusions and using 'systems' thinking. This is science for the society you live in. Study the complex problems of our age.

title: Food Product Technology – Bachelor of Food Technology with Honours
intro: Learn how to develop the great-tasting food products of the future, incorporating exciting new nutritional health benefits.

title: Food Process Engineering – Bachelor of Food Technology with Honours
intro: The world needs healthy and safe food products and ingredients manufactured on a large scale. New food products pose challenging and exciting process design problems that you can help solve.

title: Music Industry – Bachelor of Commercial Music
intro: Seek out and develop new ways to work in the commercial music industry. Learn artist development, management and distribution, and how to stage live events and tours.

title: Music Practice – Bachelor of Commercial Music
intro: Study musicianship and performance in the popular genre of your choice — whether you’re a singer, DJ, or in a band. Music Practice will give you the skills and confidence to take risks and make it in the music industry.

title: Music Technology – Bachelor of Commercial Music
intro: Explore and extend how music is created, produced and heard. In Music Technology, you’ll work at the intersection of music, creativity and technology.

title: Early Years – Postgraduate Diploma in Education
intro: Develop your knowledge and skills to become a reflective and responsive leader in early years education.

title: Without Specialisation – Postgraduate Diploma in Education
intro: Extend your professional knowledge, explore new developments, and enhance your contribution to the education field.

title: Digital Education – Postgraduate Diploma in Education
intro: Gain the critical insight and practical skills you need to thrive in the rapidly changing field of digital learning and teaching.

title: Educational Administration and Leadership – Postgraduate Diploma in Education
intro: Develop the skills and knowledge you need to progress your career as an educational leader.

title: Mātauranga Toi Māori – Bachelor of Commercial Music
intro: Study creative arts and help shape a future where te ao Māori is at the forefront of Aotearoa creative industries. A first for Aotearoa tertiary education, the Mātauranga Toi Māori major engages te ao Māori in any of our creative disciplines in Commercial Music – Music Practice, Music Technology or Music Industry.

title: Linguistics – Bachelor of Arts
intro: Learn about how language works and how people use it. Grow your ability to lead cross-cultural interactions and drive social change in an increasingly communicatively diverse world.

title: Social Anthropology – Bachelor of Arts
intro: See the world through fresh eyes. Get a unique perspective on the world, global culture, and society through the Bachelor of Arts (Social Anthropology).

title: Statistics – Bachelor of Arts
intro: The quantitative skills that you’ll gain from a Massey Bachelor of Arts (Statistics) can set you apart from other graduates when applying for jobs.

title: Politics and International Relations – Bachelor of Arts
intro: Want to know how and why decisions that affect society are made? Become equipped with the concepts, theories, and facts you need to make sense of the world around you.

title: Psychology – Bachelor of Arts
intro: Massey’s BA (Psychology) will help you explore how the brain works, and understand how we think, behave and make decisions.

title: Spanish – Bachelor of Arts
intro: Keen to boost your career prospects while learning about a new culture? Massey’s Bachelor of Arts (Spanish) will help you stand out in the international job market.

title: Sociology – Bachelor of Arts
intro: If you don’t necessarily follow the crowds but are fascinated by their behaviour, if you are curious about the world and how you can make a difference, then sociology should interest you.

title: Security Studies – Bachelor of Arts
intro: Gain a powerful combination of critical thinking skills and knowledge of global security issues.

title: Business Psychology – Bachelor of Arts
intro: Combine your strong business sense with deep insights into human behaviour, and you’re all set for an amazing career.

title: Te Reo Māori – Bachelor of Arts
intro: He taonga te reo Māori - Māori language is a treasure in Aotearoa New Zealand. Become a part of it.

title: English – Bachelor of Arts
intro: Develop your passion for literature. Understand how great writing has shaped identity, culture, and society.

title: Chinese – Diploma in Arts
intro: Are you interested in Chinese culture? The Diploma in Arts (Chinese) will develop your skills in oral and written Chinese.

title: Animation – Bachelor of Screen Arts
intro: Animation powers the stories we watch, play and share. Learn to shape the moving images that shape our world.

title: Mātauranga Toi Māori – Bachelor of Screen Arts
intro: Study creative arts and help shape a future where te ao Māori is at the forefront of Aotearoa creative industries. A first for Aotearoa tertiary education, the Mātauranga Toi Māori major engages te ao Māori in any of our creative disciplines in Screen Arts – Animation, Documentary and Factual, Emerging Creative Technologies, Film Production, Game Development or Visual Effects.

title: Film Production – Bachelor of Screen Arts
intro: The Film Production major offers comprehensive, practical filmmaking, covering all aspects of film production including creative development, pre-production, production and post-production.

title: Game Development – Bachelor of Screen Arts
intro: Games are one of the most powerful forms of storytelling, allowing players to creatively engage with characters and narratives in innovative ways.

title: Visual Effects – Bachelor of Screen Arts
intro: Bringing the unreal to life.  Love action-packed scenes, mind-blowing explosions, or epic fantasy creatures?  With the Visual Effects major, you’ll learn how to create the impossible – and make it look real.

title: Māori Studies – Bachelor of Arts
intro: With a Massey Bachelor of Arts (Māori Studies) you’ll gain knowledge of Māori culture, worldviews, and the significance of te reo Māori.

title: Documentary and Factual – Bachelor of Screen Arts
intro: Story-telling centred on real people and events is a vital record of our fast-changing times. Documentaries, docu-series and factual entertainment has the power to shape and reflect our identity – and world - back to us.

title: Emerging Creative Technologies – Bachelor of Screen Arts
intro: Virtual and Augmented Realities (VR and AR) allow new ways for us to blend the physical and digital worlds, creating uncharted possibilities for the future.

title: Economics – Bachelor of Business
intro: The Bachelor of Business (Economics) is a versatile degree where you will learn how the world of business works, and gain the skills to interpret global information and events.

title: Human Resource Management and Employment Relations – Bachelor of Business
intro: The Bachelor of Business (Human Resource Management and Employment Relations) will give you the theoretical, policy and business skills you need to understand, manage and collaborate effectively with people in the workplace.

title: Property – Bachelor of Business
intro: Studying property at Massey gives you the expertise and confidence to access exciting opportunities in the dynamic and growing property industry.

title: Management – Bachelor of Business
intro: Become a manager or entrepreneur that empowers others and makes a real difference to the future.

title: International Business – Bachelor of Business
intro: Gain the knowledge and skills, critical to business success in times of global challenges.

title: Organisational Technology Management – Bachelor of Business
intro: The Bachelor of Business (Organisational Technology Management) will give you an in-depth understanding of the impact of technology, data, and the skills needed to manage these to help businesses succeed.

title: Business Analytics – Bachelor of Business
intro: Develop your analytical skills and enhance your ability to extract value from data.

title: Lighting – Graduate Certificate in Science and Technology
intro: The Graduate Certificate in Science and Technology (Lighting) is a great qualification for those interested in any aspect of lighting – from interior design to energy efficiency.

title: Without Specialisation – Graduate Certificate in Science and Technology
intro: Successful completion of the Graduate Certificate in Science and Technology means you can go on to study the postgraduate area you are interested in, without completing a second bachelor’s degree.

title: Blind and Low Vision – Master of Specialist Teaching
intro: Work with diverse learners with Massey’s Master of Specialist Teaching (Blind and Low Vision). Gain an understanding of the development and learning needs of students who are blind or have a visual impairment.

title: Learning and Behaviour – Master of Specialist Teaching
intro: Work with diverse learners who have learning and behaviour needs. With Massey’s Master of Specialist Teaching (Learning and Behaviour), you’ll build your skills through theory and research-based study.

title: Complex Educational Needs – Master of Specialist Teaching
intro: Work with diverse learners who have complex needs. With Massey’s Master of Specialist Teaching (Complex Educational Needs), you’ll build your skills through theory and research-based study.

title: Gifted Education – Master of Specialist Teaching
intro: With Massey’s Master of Specialist Teaching (Gifted Education), you'll learn how to understand, identify and develop an individual’s exceptional abilities and qualities.

title: Early Intervention – Master of Specialist Teaching
intro: Work with diverse learners with Massey’s Master of Specialist Teaching (Early Intervention). Gain an understanding of the development and learning needs of students who are in the early years.

title: Deaf and Hard of Hearing – Master of Specialist Teaching
intro: Work with diverse learners who are deaf and hard of hearing. With Massey’s Master of Specialist Teaching (Deaf and Hard of Hearing) you’ll build your skills through theory and research-based study.

title: Adviser on Deaf Children – Master of Specialist Teaching
intro: Work with diverse learners and their teachers. With Massey’s Master of Specialist Teaching (Adviser on Deaf Children) you’ll build your skills through theory and research-based study.

title: Without Specialisation – Master of Specialist Teaching
intro: If you’re keen to work with diverse learners and their teachers, then a Master of Specialist Teaching is for you.

title: Nursing – Master of Health Science
intro: Advance your knowledge and skills in the health sector with Massey’s Master of Health Science (Nursing).

title: Sport and Exercise – Master of Health Science
intro: Elevate your career in sport and exercise with Massey’s Master of Health Science.

title: Without Specialisation – Master of Health Science
intro: Advance your knowledge and skills in the growing health industry.

title: Geography – Postgraduate Diploma in Arts
intro: Take your study of geography to a higher level with Massey’s Postgraduate Diploma in Arts (Geography). Enhance your research skills by investigating a topic in geography that interests you.

title: English – Postgraduate Diploma in Arts
intro: A Massey Postgraduate Diploma in Arts (English) will help you understand how language shapes the world we live in.

title: Education – Postgraduate Diploma in Arts
intro: Follow your passion for education with Massey’s Postgraduate Diploma in Arts (Education). Through a flexible qualification, you will gain valuable skills and knowledge in an area of education you are interested in.

title: Media Studies – Postgraduate Diploma in Arts
intro: Build on your undergraduate interests in media studies with Massey’s Postgraduate Diploma in Arts (Media Studies). Develop your research and analysis skills by exploring an area that interests you.

title: History – Postgraduate Diploma in Arts
intro: Take your study of history to the next level with Massey’s Postgraduate Diploma in Arts (History). Enhance your research skills through an investigation of a time or theme in history that interests you.

title: Philosophy – Postgraduate Diploma in Arts
intro: Build on your undergraduate interests and enhance your research and critical analysis skills. With Massey’s PGDipArts (Philosophy) you’ll develop highly applicable and useful skills that are in demand.

title: Sociology – Postgraduate Diploma in Arts
intro: Take your study of sociology to the next level with Massey’s Postgraduate Diploma in Arts (Sociology). Get the knowledge and competencies you need to start your career.

title: Social Anthropology – Postgraduate Diploma in Arts
intro: Take your study of social anthropology to the next level. By understanding human behaviour and interactions, you’ll have skills that will be useful in almost every career path, all over the world.

title: Psychology – Postgraduate Diploma in Arts
intro: Have a bachelor’s degree in psychology and keen to take a step further? This qualification provides a stepping stone to a higher-level qualification such as a master’s degree.

title: Defence and Security Studies – Master of Arts
intro: Join Massey’s Master of Arts (Defence and Security Studies) to build an advanced understanding of security and defence. You will carry out research in an area of your choice.

title: Economics – Master of Arts
intro: Open up a world of employment options. With Massey’s Master of Arts (Economics) you’ll build on your undergraduate interests and develop your analysis and research skills.

title: Geography – Master of Arts
intro: Take your study of geography to a higher level with Massey’s Master of Arts (Geography). You can build on your undergraduate interest in geography and develop your critical research skills.

title: Education – Master of Arts
intro: Follow your passion for education with Massey’s Master of Arts (Education). Investigate education issues that interested you as an undergraduate in a flexible timeframe that suits you.

title: Media Studies – Master of Arts
intro: With Massey’s Master of Arts (Media Studies), develop critical research skills exploring an aspect of media that interests you. Gain advanced insights into media studies that will build on your undergraduate knowledge.

title: English – Master of Arts
intro: With Massey’s Master of Arts (English) you can build on your undergraduate study and follow your passion for literature. Complete advanced research into an aspect of English, rhetoric or theatre studies.

title: Museum Studies – Master of Arts
intro: Prepare to meet the challenges of working in cultural organisations with the Master of Arts (Museum Studies). Build on your undergraduate study and complete advanced research of an aspect of museum studies that interests you.

title: Social Anthropology – Master of Arts
intro: Immerse yourself in another world. With Massey’s Master of Arts (Social Anthropology) you can build on your undergraduate study and complete advanced research of an aspect of social anthropology that interests you.

title: Philosophy – Master of Arts
intro: Tackle the questions that have always gripped humanity. With Massey’s Master of Arts (Philosophy), you can build on your undergraduate study and complete advanced research of an aspect of philosophy that interests you.

title: Sociology – Master of Arts
intro: Take your study of sociology to the next level. With Massey’s Master of Arts (Sociology) you can build on your undergraduate study and complete advanced research of an aspect of sociology that interests you.

title: Psychology – Master of Arts
intro: With Massey’s Master of Arts (Psychology) you'll build on your undergraduate study and complete advanced research of a psychology field that interests you. This provides a competitive edge of knowledge in psychology among your peers.

title: History – Master of Arts
intro: With Massey’s Master of Arts (History) you can build on your undergraduate study and follow your passion for history. Complete advanced research of an aspect of history that interests you.

title: Intelligence – Postgraduate Diploma in International Security
intro: Gain advanced knowledge of contemporary international intelligence activities in a multi-agency context. Your skills will be in demand.

title: Counter-Terrorism – Postgraduate Diploma in International Security
intro: Gain an understanding of the theories, concepts, and typologies of terrorism, violent extremism, and radicalisation.

title: Without Specialisation – Postgraduate Diploma in International Security
intro: Gain advanced knowledge of the security sector with Massey’s Postgraduate Diploma in International Security.

title: Animal Genetics and Breeding – Bachelor of Animal Science
intro: Learn how animal breeding and genetics can have a positive impact on animal industries and the New Zealand economy.

title: Animal Welfare – Bachelor of Animal Science
intro: Keen to make a difference in the lives of animals? Combine your love of animals and science to make a difference to their health and welfare.

title: Border and Biosecurity – Postgraduate Diploma in International Security
intro: Gain government-ready skills for a career in border management or biosecurity.

title: Equine Science – Bachelor of Animal Science
intro: Gain the knowledge base and the analytical and management skills for a career helping improve the productivity and sustainability of the equine industry.

title: Animal Nutrition and Growth – Bachelor of Animal Science
intro: Combine your love of animals and science with the only animal science degree available in New Zealand. This degree focuses on how nutrition contributes to the performance and health of animals.

title: Professional Accountancy (Chartered Accountant) – Postgraduate Diploma in Business
intro: This qualification seamlessly integrates the CA Program, guiding you to Chartered Accountancy. Further develop your understanding of accountancy principles and practical applications, and elevate your accountancy career to new heights.

title: Early Intervention – Postgraduate Diploma in Specialist Teaching
intro: With Massey’s Postgraduate Diploma in Specialist Teaching (Early Intervention) you can create more equitable learning outcomes for all learners.

title: Learning and Behaviour – Postgraduate Diploma in Specialist Teaching
intro: With Massey’s Postgraduate Diploma in Specialist Teaching (Learning and Behaviour) you can create more equitable learning outcomes for all learners.

title: Gifted Education – Postgraduate Diploma in Specialist Teaching
intro: With Massey’s Postgraduate Diploma in Specialist Teaching (Gifted Education) you can create more equitable learning outcomes for all learners.

title: Complex Educational Needs – Postgraduate Diploma in Specialist Teaching
intro: With Massey’s Postgraduate Diploma in Specialist Teaching (Complex Educational Needs) you can create more equitable learning outcomes for all learners.

title: Deaf and Hard of Hearing – Postgraduate Diploma in Specialist Teaching
intro: With Massey’s Postgraduate Diploma in Specialist Teaching (Deaf and Hard of Hearing) you can create more equitable learning outcomes for Deaf and Hard of Hearing learners.

title: Blind and Low Vision – Postgraduate Diploma in Specialist Teaching
intro: With Massey’s Postgraduate Diploma in Specialist Teaching (Blind and Low Vision) you can create more equitable learning outcomes for all learners.

title: Without Specialisation – Postgraduate Diploma in Business
intro: Tailor your diploma to your interests and your lifestyle.

title: Construction Management – Bachelor of Construction
intro: With Massey’s Bachelor of Construction (Construction Management), you will be able to make your mark on this growing industry. Most of our students have a cadet position before they have finished their degree.

title: Quantity Surveying – Bachelor of Construction
intro: Work on exciting construction projects from start to finish, ensuring they are well managed financially.

title: Design Management – Bachelor of Construction
intro: Make your mark on this growing industry; you'll lead, coordinate and manage building design projects.

title: Business Administration – Postgraduate Certificate in Business
intro: A flexible, practice-focused qualification for experienced professionals who want to boost their leadership skills and career prospects.

title: Without Specialisation – Postgraduate Certificate in Business
intro: Whether you’re interested in a specific professional development course, or entry to further study, the PGCertBus offers the flexibility to study in the areas you choose.

title: Primary – Graduate Diploma of Learning and Teaching
intro: Massey’s Graduate Diploma of Learning and Teaching (Primary) reflects the dynamic, complex, and responsive nature of learning and teaching. This initial teacher education qualification offers specific knowledge in primary and intermediate school teaching.

title: Secondary – Graduate Diploma of Learning and Teaching
intro: Be a leader in 21st century education with Massey’s Graduate Diploma of Learning and Teaching (Secondary). This initial teacher education qualification offers professional experience, and the opportunity to learn from esteemed practitioners and researchers.

title: Early Childhood Education – Graduate Diploma of Learning and Teaching
intro: Massey’s Graduate Diploma of Learning and Teaching (Early Childhood Education) reflects the dynamic, complex, and responsive nature of learning and teaching. This initial teacher education qualification offers specific knowledge in early childhood education.

title: Business – Master of Analytics
intro: Gain an industry-recognised and highly sought-after qualification in data analytics. Become a technology leader with the practical skills to innovate and propel businesses forward with data-driven insights.

title: Human Resource Management – Master of Management
intro: Gain the human resource management knowledge and strategic skills to help elevate your career and maximise the potential of people within your organisation.

title: International Business – Master of Management
intro: Move your career in a new direction with Massey’s Master of Management (International Business). Develop your skills and knowledge related to international business.

title: Marketing – Master of Management
intro: Massey’s Master of Management will increase your business knowledge and give you an in-depth understanding of marketing. You don’t have to have a qualification in business to undertake this master’s

title: Management – Master of Management
intro: Massey’s Master of Management will increase your business knowledge to help move your career in a new direction. You don’t have to have a qualification in business to undertake this master’s.

title: Disaster Management – Master of Sustainable Development Goals
intro: Massey’s Master of Sustainable Development Goals (Disaster Management) will give you an advanced grounding in the theory, practice, and application of the UN Sustainable Development Goals related to disaster management.

title: Business and Sustainability – Master of Sustainable Development Goals
intro: This qualification will give you an advanced grounding in the theory, practice, and application of the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals related to business and sustainability.

title: Environmental Sustainability – Master of Sustainable Development Goals
intro: This qualification will give you an advanced grounding in the theory, practice, and application of the UN Sustainable Development Goals related to environmental sustainability.

title: Global Development – Master of Sustainable Development Goals
intro: Massey’s Master of Sustainable Development Goals (Global Development) will give you an advanced grounding in the theory, practice, and application of the UN Sustainable Development Goals related to global development.

title: Climate Action – Master of Sustainable Development Goals
intro: Equips you with the skills and knowledge required to work within the field of climate change mitigation and adaptation.

title: Sustainability – Master of Management
intro: Gain the skills to be an effective manager within a sustainable-focused industry, or bring an increasingly important perspective to any business.

title: Educational Equity – Master of Sustainable Development Goals
intro: Equips you with the knowledge and skills to take on leading education roles in diverse global and national contexts with a greater sense of equity and social justice through and within education.

title: Horticultural Production – Bachelor of Horticultural and Plant Systems
intro: Do you have a passion for plants and people? Join one of the country’s largest economic sectors and gain skills for managing various crop production systems including orchards, open-fields and controlled environments.

title: Integrative Plant Biology – Bachelor of Horticultural and Plant Systems
intro: Where plant biology meets real-world impact – hands-on, job-ready, future-focused.

title: Air Transport Pilot – Bachelor of Aviation
intro: Gain a professional qualification that integrates a research-led flight training programme into university courses at an internationally recognised training facility.

title: Intelligence – Master of International Security
intro: With Massey’s Master of International Security (Intelligence), you’ll gain advanced knowledge of contemporary international intelligence activities in a multi-agency context.

title: Without Specialisation – Master of International Security
intro: Advance your security career with Massey’s Master of International Security.

title: Counter-Terrorism – Master of International Security
intro: Gain in-demand skills with Massey’s Master of International Security (Counter-Terrorism). Understand the theories, concepts, and typologies of terrorism, violent extremism, and radicalisation.

title: Border and Biosecurity – Master of International Security
intro: Gain government-ready skills for a career in border management or biosecurity.

title: Without Specialisation – Master of Applied Linguistics
intro: Take your career to the next level with Massey’s Master of Applied Linguistics. Help make second-language teaching more accessible in a multilingual world.

title: Teaching English to Speakers of Other Languages – Master of Applied Linguistics
intro: Massey’s Master of Applied Linguistics (Teaching English to Speakers of Other Languages) provides in-service development for practising teachers of English as a second language.

title: Māori Health – Postgraduate Diploma in Health Science
intro: This qualification enables you to specialise in Māori knowledge within advanced health studies. Explore the progress made and the potential to further develop the health and wellbeing of Māori communities.

title: Financial Analytics and Research – Master of Finance
intro: Massey’s Master of Finance (Financial Analytics and Research) combines the study of advanced finance theory and research to complete the qualification.

title: Risk Analytics – Master of Finance
intro: Massey’s Master of Finance (Risk Analytics) combines the study of advanced finance theory and completes the qualification with professional inquiry.

title: Financial Technology – Master of Finance
intro: Massey’s Master of Finance (Financial Technology) combines the study of advanced finance theory and completes the qualification with professional inquiry.

title: Psychology – Postgraduate Diploma in Health Science
intro: With Massey’s Postgraduate Diploma in Health Science (Psychology), you’ll study in more detail the thoughts, feelings, and actions of individuals and groups in social and cultural contexts.

title: Occupational Health and Safety – Postgraduate Diploma in Health Science
intro: Occupational health and safety (OHS) has become an integral part of business. Help improve the health and wellbeing of workers by preventing work-related injuries.

title: Media Studies – Graduate Diploma in Arts
intro: Create, critique, and connect with your media world with the Graduate Diploma in Arts (Media Studies). You will gain the equivalent of an undergraduate major in media studies without completing a second bachelor’s degree.

title: Linguistics – Graduate Diploma in Arts
intro: Use language to drive your career. The Graduate Diploma in Arts (Linguistics) will give you the equivalent of an undergraduate major in linguistics without completing a second bachelor’s degree.

title: Creative Writing – Graduate Diploma in Arts
intro: Examine great creative works and start writing your own. The Graduate Diploma in Arts (Creative Writing) will give you the equivalent of an undergraduate major in creative writing without completing a second bachelor’s degree.

title: English – Graduate Diploma in Arts
intro: The Graduate Diploma in Arts (English) will give you the equivalent of an undergraduate major in English without having to complete a second bachelor’s degree.

title: Sociology – Graduate Diploma in Arts
intro: If you don’t necessarily follow the crowds but are fascinated by their behaviour, if you are curious about the world and how you can make a difference, then sociology should interest you.

title: Security Studies – Graduate Diploma in Arts
intro: Gain knowledge about local and global security issues. The Graduate Diploma in Arts (Security Studies) will give you the equivalent of an undergraduate major in security studies without completing a second bachelor’s degree.

title: Without Specialisation – Graduate Diploma in Arts
intro: Learn to be a critical thinker, problem-solver, and inspire people with Massey's Graduate Diploma in Arts.

title: Without Specialisation – Postgraduate Diploma in Health Science
intro: Massey’s Postgraduate Diploma in Health Science will give you the skills you need to succeed in the growing health industry.

title: Mathematics – Graduate Diploma in Arts
intro: Build your knowledge of mathematics and learn how to communicate your findings, with Massey’s Graduate Diploma in Arts (Mathematics).

title: Classical Studies – Graduate Diploma in Arts
intro: Follow your passion for classical studies. Massey’s Graduate Diploma in Arts (Classical Studies) will give you the equivalent of an undergraduate major in classical studies without completing a second bachelor’s degree.

title: Development Studies – Graduate Diploma in Arts
intro: Transform lives with development studies. The Graduate Diploma in Arts (Development Studies) will give you the equivalent of an undergraduate major in development studies without completing a second bachelor’s degree.

title: Chinese – Graduate Diploma in Arts
intro: The Graduate Diploma in Arts (Chinese) will give you the equivalent of an undergraduate major in Chinese without completing a second bachelor’s degree.

title: Economics – Graduate Diploma in Arts
intro: The Graduate Diploma in Arts (Economics) will give you the equivalent of an undergraduate major in economics without having to complete a second bachelor’s degree.

title: Education – Graduate Diploma in Arts
intro: Transform lives with a career in education. Massey’s Graduate Diploma in Arts (Education) will give you the equivalent of an undergraduate major in education without completing a second bachelor’s degree.

title: Geography – Graduate Diploma in Arts
intro: The Graduate Diploma in Arts (Geography) will give you the equivalent of an undergraduate major in geography without having to complete a second bachelor’s degree.

title: History – Graduate Diploma in Arts
intro: The Graduate Diploma in Arts (History) will give you the equivalent of an undergraduate major in history without having to complete a second bachelor’s degree.

title: Philosophy – Graduate Diploma in Arts
intro: The Graduate Diploma in Arts (Philosophy) will give you the equivalent of an undergraduate major in philosophy without completing a second bachelor’s degree.

title: Japanese – Graduate Diploma in Arts
intro: The Graduate Diploma in Arts (Japanese) will give you the equivalent of an undergraduate major in Japanese without completing a second bachelor’s degree.

title: Politics and International Relations – Graduate Diploma in Arts
intro: Be informed about how decisions are made in society. This Graduate Diploma in Arts will give you the equivalent of an undergraduate major in politics without completing a second bachelor’s degree.

title: Educational Psychology – Graduate Diploma in Arts
intro: Help people learn, develop and achieve with Massey’s Graduate Diploma in Arts (Educational Psychology).

title: Environmental Studies – Graduate Diploma in Arts
intro: Explore the dynamic relationship between human society and our environment with Massey’s Graduate Diploma in Arts (Environmental Studies).

title: Psychology – Graduate Diploma in Arts
intro: The Graduate Diploma in Arts (Psychology) will give you the equivalent of an undergraduate major in psychology without completing a second bachelor’s degree.

title: Social Anthropology – Graduate Diploma in Arts
intro: Get a better understanding of the world with Massey’s Graduate Diploma in Arts (Social Anthropology). Gain the equivalent of an undergraduate major in social anthropology without completing a second bachelor’s degree.

title: Spanish – Graduate Diploma in Arts
intro: Learn Spanish, one of the most widely spoken languages in the world. The Graduate Diploma in Arts (Spanish) will give you the equivalent of an undergraduate major in Spanish without completing a second bachelor’s degree.

title: Statistics – Graduate Diploma in Arts
intro: With Massey’s Graduate Diploma in Arts (Statistics) you’ll learn the key theories of statistics, and gain the quantitative skills to conduct robust statistical analysis that’s effective in the real world.

title: Farm Management – Bachelor of Agribusiness
intro: At Massey, many of our agribusiness students have jobs before they even graduate. Learn how to build and deliver profitable and sustainable businesses.

title: International Agribusiness – Bachelor of Agribusiness
intro: Go global with your agribusiness skills. Learn how agricultural products are created, marketed, and distributed internationally.

title: Māori Studies – Graduate Diploma in Arts
intro: Learn about Māori culture, society, and language. This Graduate Diploma in Arts will give you the equivalent of an undergraduate major in Māori studies without completing a second bachelor’s degree.

title: Aviation Studies – Graduate Diploma in Aviation
intro: Take your aviation career to the next level with Massey's Graduate Diploma in Aviation. Gain a university qualification while following your passion for aviation.

title: Media Technology – Bachelor of Screen Arts with Honours
intro: The evolution of media technologies and screen production, driven by digital innovation, is offering new ways of working and is creating new tools and techniques for content production and consumption.

title: Flight Instruction – Graduate Diploma in Aviation
intro: Add a new dimension to your commercial pilot’s licence. Gain a university qualification while following your passion for aviation.

title: Film Production – Bachelor of Screen Arts with Honours
intro: The Film Production major offers comprehensive, practical filmmaking, covering all aspects of film production including creative development, pre-production, production and post-production.

title: Animation – Bachelor of Screen Arts with Honours
intro: Animation powers the stories we watch, play and share. Take your craft further with advanced practice, research and professional development.

title: Visual Effects – Bachelor of Screen Arts with Honours
intro: The Visual Effects major provides expertise in creating fantastic characters and scenes for all forms of screen media.

title: Game Development – Bachelor of Screen Arts with Honours
intro: Games are one of the most powerful forms of storytelling, allowing players to creatively engage with characters and narratives in innovative ways.

title: Mātauranga Toi Māori – Bachelor of Screen Arts with Honours
intro: Study creative arts and help shape a future where te ao Māori is at the forefront of Aotearoa creative industries. A first for Aotearoa tertiary education, the Mātauranga Toi Māori major engages te ao Māori in any of our creative disciplines in Screen Arts – Animation, Documentary and Factual, Emerging Creative Technologies, Film Production, Game Development or Visual Effects.

title: Horticultural Management – Bachelor of Agribusiness
intro: Grow your skills. Learn how to build and deliver profitable and sustainable horticultural businesses, alongside the science of food crops. Get a job before you graduate in New Zealand’s booming industry.

title: Documentary and Factual – Bachelor of Screen Arts with Honours
intro: Storytelling is the basis for all human connection, and stories that tell us about real people, situations and issues are compelling touchstones in relating to our fast-changing times. True stories shape our identity and reflect our world back to us.

title: Quantity Surveying – Bachelor of Construction (Honours)
intro: Become a construction expert who can contribute to all sectors of the construction industry with Massey's Bachelor of Construction (Honours) (Quantity Surveying).

title: Construction Management – Bachelor of Construction (Honours)
intro: With Massey's Bachelor of Construction (Honours) (Construction Management), you will become a highly sought-after construction expert who can contribute to all sectors of the construction industry.

title: Land and Water Science – Bachelor of Earth and Environmental Science
intro: Balance the prosperity and environmental stewardship of the Earth. Understand how we impact Earth’s systems and use your scientific skills to steer us towards a more sustainable future.

title: Geoscience – Bachelor of Earth and Environmental Science
intro: Balance the prosperity and environmental stewardship of the Earth. Understand how we impact Earth’s systems and use your scientific skills to steer us towards a more sustainable future.

title: Visual Communication Design – Bachelor of Design
intro: Visual communication is one of the most universal forms of design. It is at the heart of how our world works; guiding, informing, persuading, and inspiring us every day.

title: Fashion Design – Bachelor of Design
intro: Kick start your fashion design career with a degree from the school that has produced designers like Kate Sylvester, Kathryn Wilson, Rebecca Taylor, and Sean Kelly (Project Runway NY winner, 2014).

title: Spatial Design – Bachelor of Design
intro: From designing a home interior, or public building to an interactive exhibition, or a virtual world, spatial designers have myriad opportunities at their fingertips. Let your imagination soar.

title: Photography – Bachelor of Design
intro: Great photographers shake us, shift our perceptions and entice us to see things differently. Learn from leading photographers and develop your technical skills with our professional cameras and specialist studios and labs.

title: Textile Design – Bachelor of Design
intro: Textiles span everything from design for fashion and interiors, to industrial products and gallery exhibitions. Learn to innovate in material, pattern and surface design, and consider environmental, social and cultural challenges.

title: Emerging Creative Technologies – Bachelor of Screen Arts with Honours
intro: Virtual and Augmented Realities (VR and AR) allow new ways for us to blend the physical and digital worlds, creating uncharted possibilities for the future.

title: Mātauranga Toi Māori – Bachelor of Design
intro: Study creative arts and help shape a future where te ao Māori is at the forefront of Aotearoa creative industries. A first for Aotearoa tertiary education, the Mātauranga Toi Māori major engages te ao Māori in any of our creative disciplines in Design – Concept, Fashion, Industrial, Integrated, Photography, Spatial, Textiles or Visual Communication Design.

title: Concept Design – Bachelor of Design
intro: Imagine new worlds with Massey's Bachelor of Design (Concept Design). Learn how to design concepts for entertainment and education within film, animation, television, gaming, and location-based experiences.

title: Integrated Design – Bachelor of Design
intro: Take a unified approach to design. Develop strong design strategies and contextual understanding, applying your technical skills in the design fields of your choice.

title: Industrial Design – Bachelor of Design
intro: Industrial design is a great choice if you enjoy designing, inventing, and making three-dimensional products. From smartphones to movie sets, industrial design transforms people’s lives - and Massey grads are at the forefront.

title: Without Specialisation – Bachelor of Fine Arts
intro: Discover how to produce work that makes people think and feel, act and react. Whatever your mode of art-making is, we’ll help you find and develop your own creative voice.

title: Mātauranga Toi Māori – Bachelor of Fine Arts
intro: Study creative arts and help shape a future where te ao Māori is at the forefront of Aotearoa creative industries. A first for Aotearoa tertiary education, the Mātauranga Toi Māori major engages te ao Māori in Fine Arts disciplines.

title: Te Reo – Master of Māori Studies
intro:
Advancing mātauranga Māori through language and scholarship.

Whaowhia te kete mātauranga.

title: Hauora – Master of Māori Studies
intro:
Advancing hauora for future generations.

Whai mātauranga, Whakatipu hauora.

title: Māori Education – Master of Māori Studies
intro:
Integrating Māori knowledge, critical inquiry and cultural knowledge in education and praxis.

Kia tipu ake ai te mātauranga, e ora ai te mātauranga.

title: Critical Studies in Māori Development – Master of Māori Studies
intro:
Advancing Māori futures through critical enquiry, research development and cultural knowledge.

E tipu, e rea mō ngā rā o tōu ao.
